$comment: Keyboard and focus contract for the WPF desktop shell. Defines the expected tab order, default/cancel buttons, Escape behavior, focus trap/restoration, and screen-reader naming for every interactive surface.

globalBindings.behavior: Dismisses the topmost overlay (prompt, then activity) or navigates back if no overlay is open.
Refreshes the environment snapshot from disk.

overlays.name: PromptOverlay
overlays.focusOnDismiss: Restores focus to the element that was focused before the prompt opened.
contract: Tab cycles within the prompt; does not leak to main content.
Destructive prompts focus Cancel first to prevent accidental Enter.
Escape closes the prompt without executing the action.
Focus is restored to the prior element when the prompt closes.

overlays.name: ActivityOverlay
overlays.focusOnDismiss: Restores focus to the element that was focused before the activity opened.
contract: Tab cycles within the activity overlay; does not leak to main content.
While running: root element is focused so screen readers can announce progress.
After completion: focuses the first available action button (close, copy log, open folder).
Focus is restored to the prior element when the activity closes.

pages.name: Recommended
pages.tabOrder: Sidebar nav → workspace content → run button
pages.notes: Single-action page; sidebar RadioButtons are keyboard-navigable.

pages.name: Custom
pages.tabOrder: Sidebar nav → option groups → theme/scheme selectors → extensions → run button
pages.notes: Settings search box is reachable via Tab. Search results are focusable.

pages.name: Maintenance
pages.initialFocus: First health card or action button
pages.tabOrder: Sidebar nav → health cards → action buttons
pages.notes: Destructive buttons (Full Reset) use warning/danger styling as non-color-only indicators.

focusVisuals.strategy: Custom ring-based indicators replace system FocusVisualStyle on all interactive controls.
controls: Button: 2px AccentRingBrush overlay ring on IsKeyboardFocused, Margin=-3 (no layout shift)
CheckBox: Same overlay ring pattern with Opacity animation
TabItem: IsKeyboardFocusWithin trigger so focus ring shows when any child has focus
focusVisuals.contract: Every custom control either preserves a visible system focus cue or uses the AccentRingBrush custom replacement. FocusVisualStyle={x:Null} is only set when a custom ring trigger exists.
